title: Senator Anna M. Caballero (SD 12) Announces legislation to bridge the digital divide in rural and underserved communities throughout the state.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has highlighted the internet service disparities faced by rural and underserved communities.",
    "Internet service providers prioritize profit, which leads to a lack of services in low-density or low-income areas.",
    "The Rural Broadband and Digital Infrastructure Video Competition Reform Act of 2021 aims to help rural communities build broadband networks.",
    "The act requires various state departments to identify state properties suitable for broadband network development.",
    "The proposed legislation aims to facilitate broadband network deployment without introducing new taxes or fees.",
    "According to Senator Caballero, the Digital Divide places students, residents, and business owners at a disadvantage in California."
  ]
}
```
